name: NEXUS tab switching between editor, preview, and agent
description: When a user clicks each tab in the floating bottom dock (editor, preview, agent), the main content area switches to show the corresponding view: the code editor with line numbers, the live preview with device size buttons, and the AI chat agent with a greeting message.

planSteps.description: Verify the floating bottom dock at the bottom of the screen shows three navigation tabs
Click the second tab in the bottom dock to switch to the preview view
Verify the main content area now shows a live preview pane with device size buttons (desktop, tablet, mobile)
Click the third tab in the bottom dock to switch to the agent view
Verify the main content area now shows an AI chat agent interface with a greeting message visible
Click the first tab in the bottom dock to switch back to the editor view
Verify the main content area shows the code editor with line numbers again
